Body.Content:
We are announcing Multi Select in Grid column filtering in Power Apps. This feature will reach public preview on August 7, 2026.

How does this affect me?
With this feature, users can now filter records using fields that support multiple selected values in model-driven apps. When a list includes this type of field, users can apply filters based on one or more values to refine the records shown.

What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

Title: Power Apps - Multi Select in Grid column filtering
